common.site_description: Measure how visible your site is to AI answer engines

errors.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address
errors.send_failed: Could not send the link. Please try again.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: We'll email you a magic link — no password required.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a magic link.

verify.title: Check your email
verify.subtitle: We sent a magic link to {email}. Click the link in the email to continue.
verify.did_not_receive: Didn't receive it? Check spam, or use a different email.

onboarding.title: Set up your workspace
onboarding.subtitle: Workspaces hold your sites and analyses.

callback.failed_subtitle: The link may have expired. Try requesting a new one.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.no_workspace: You don't have a workspace yet.

sites.title: Sites
sites.subtitle: Sites and competitors tracked in {workspace}.
sites.own_empty: Add your first site to start measuring AEO visibility.
sites.no_workspace_yet: Set up a workspace to start tracking sites.
sites.analyses_empty: No analyses yet. Run your first analysis to see results.
sites.site_not_found: We couldn't find this site in any of your workspaces.
sites.delete_confirm: Delete site {domain}? It will enter a 30-day cooldown before the domain can be re-added.
sites.delete_forbidden: Only workspace admins or owners can delete sites.

form.type_own_desc: A site you own and want to improve.
form.type_competitor_desc: A site you want to benchmark against.
form.err_invalid_url: URL is invalid or missing a domain.
form.err_trial_expired: Your trial has ended. Upgrade to continue editing.
form.err_plan_limit: Your plan limit has been reached. Upgrade or remove a site.
form.err_conflict: This domain is already registered or in a 30-day cooldown.
form.err_url_change_limit: URL changes are limited to once per 30 days per workspace.

analyze.title: Run analysis
analyze.description: Choose which categories to analyze. Full scans cover all five.
analyze.quota_none: Your plan has no analyses remaining this month.
analyze.err_quota_or_trial: Out of analyses or trial expired. Upgrade to continue.
analyze.err_forbidden: You don't have permission to trigger an analysis.
analyze.err_concurrent: Another analysis is already running for this workspace.
analyze.err_cooldown: This site was analyzed less than an hour ago. Try again later.

results.result_not_found: We couldn't find this analysis result.
results.running_subtitle: We're scoring your site. This page will update automatically.
results.insights_unavailable: Insights are not available for this analysis.
results.insights_high_priority_capped: Some high-priority items were demoted to medium to keep the list focused.
results.improvements_empty: No specific improvements were generated for this analysis.

charts.timeseries_empty: No completed analyses to chart yet.
charts.timeseries_single_point: Latest score: {score}/100 ({when}). Run another analysis to see the trend.
charts.timeseries_partial_legend: ✕ markers indicate partial analyses (some categories were skipped).
charts.radar_empty: No category scores available for this analysis.

pricing.title: Plans that grow with your visibility
pricing.subtitle: Start free for 7 days. Upgrade when you're ready to track competitors, expand sites, and unlock historical trends.
pricing.footnote: Prices in USD. Monthly plans cancel anytime. Annual plans save up to 15%.

free.name: Free Trial
free.tagline: Try every feature for 7 days. No card required.

basic.name: Basic
basic.tagline: For solo founders measuring a single site.

pro.name: Pro
pro.tagline: For marketing teams running comparisons across sites.

business.name: Business
business.tagline: For growing teams with industry benchmarks and SLA support.

enterprise.title: Custom plan for large organizations
enterprise.description: Annual contract with unlimited sites, competitors, custom analyses, and a dedicated customer success manager. Wire transfer accepted.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.subtitle: Tell us what you need — demo, sales, support, or anything else. We typically reply within one business day.
contact.privacy_note: We use your message only to reply. Your data is never shared.

errors.name_too_long: Name must be 200 characters or fewer.
errors.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.company_too_long: Company must be 200 characters or fewer.
errors.message_too_long: Message must be 5000 characters or fewer.
errors.rate_limit: You've sent several messages recently. Please try again in a minute.
errors.validation: Please check the form for errors.
errors.network: We couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong sending your message. Please try again.

success.title: Thanks — we got your message.
success.description: We'll review and reply to your email within one business day.
